rules.rule_text:
rule vskimmer
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-09-02"
		description = "Identify vSkimmer"

	strings:
		$s1 = "User-Agent: PCICompliant/3.33"
		$s2 = "[3-9]{1}[0-9]{12,19}[D=\\u0061][0-9]{10,30}"
		$s3 = "PCI Compliant SCard"

	condition:
		all of them
}
